subcodes.first_line: O thou my beloved daughter! Thy letter was received. Its contents imparted the utmost of happiness. It indicated that that “Setareh” is shining.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز من نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل شد زیرا دلیل بر آن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
